synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2784 Oracle Linux 9 mesa bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2784
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2784

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-2784.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:
